AboutPage.heroDesc: Built for professionals and trusted Worldwide. Elevating Hospitality & Culinary Excellence since 2008.
AboutPage.videoDesc: Discover how BetterKing transforms commercial spaces into world-class culinary environments with cutting-edge kitchen solutions.
AboutPage.storyP1: BetterKing commercial kitchen solutions are designed for performance, durability, and precision—trusted by professionals across the globe. From 5-star hotels to high-volume restaurant chains, we deliver end-to-end kitchen solutions that elevate culinary operations.
AboutPage.storyP2: Our team of engineers and designers work closely with chefs and hospitality professionals to create kitchens that are not just functional, but inspirational. Every project is a testament to our commitment to excellence.
AboutPage.bossQuote: "Powering world-class kitchens behind world-class hospitality. BetterKing commercial kitchen solutions are designed for performance, durability, and precision—trusted by professionals across the globe."
AboutPage.bossConnect: 📩 Let's connect and build smarter kitchens together.
AboutPage.v1Desc: Every product is designed with millimeter precision to ensure perfect fit and lasting performance in demanding commercial environments.
AboutPage.v2Desc: We source only the finest materials and apply rigorous quality control at every stage of manufacturing.
AboutPage.v3Desc: Your kitchen vision drives our process. We listen, design, and deliver solutions tailored to your unique needs.
AboutPage.v4Desc: Constantly pushing boundaries with the latest technology and energy-efficient designs for modern kitchens.
AboutPage.m1Desc: BetterKing was established with a vision to revolutionize commercial kitchen solutions.
AboutPage.m2Desc: Expanded operations to serve clients across Asia, Middle East, and Europe.
AboutPage.m3Desc: Reached the milestone of completing over 500 commercial kitchen installations worldwide.
AboutPage.m4Desc: Launched our R&D center focused on energy-efficient and smart kitchen technologies.
AboutPage.m5Desc: Recognized as a top commercial kitchen solutions provider serving 50+ countries.
AboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to Build Your Dream Kitchen?
AboutPage.ctaDesc: Let our experts design a commercial kitchen solution tailored to your needs.

ContactPage.faqDesc: Find quick answers to the most common inquiries about our products and services.

faqs.q1: What is the typical lead time for orders?
faqs.a1: Standard orders are processed within 5–7 business days. Custom or bulk orders may take 2–4 weeks depending on specifications and inventory availability.
faqs.a2: Yes, we provide professional installation services for all major equipment. Our certified technicians ensure proper setup and calibration for optimal performance.
faqs.q3: What warranty do your products come with?
faqs.a3: All products come with a minimum 2-year manufacturer warranty. Extended warranty packages of up to 5 years are available for purchase at checkout.
faqs.q4: Can I request a custom quote for bulk orders?
faqs.a4: Absolutely! Use our 'Get a Quote' form or contact our sales team directly. We offer competitive pricing for bulk and institutional orders.
faqs.a5: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination. Contact us for a detailed estimate.
faqs.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a6: We accept all major credit cards, bank transfers, and purchase orders for verified business accounts. Financing options are also available for qualifying orders.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you request a quote, contact customer support, or interact with our website. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and company details.
PrivacyPolicy.section2Content: We use the information we collect to:
PrivacyPolicy.point1: Provide, maintain, and improve our commercial kitchen equipment and services.
PrivacyPolicy.point2: Process transactions, send invoices, and handle shipping logistics.
PrivacyPolicy.point3: Send technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages.
PrivacyPolicy.section3Content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our website and hold certain information to improve your browsing experience. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies.
PrivacyPolicy.section4Content: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.section1Content: By accessing or using the BetterKing Kitchen website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.
TermsOfService.section2Content: We specialize in commercial kitchen equipment. All product descriptions, specifications, and pricing are subject to change at any time without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any product at any time.
TermsOfService.section3Content: You agree to use our website and products only for lawful purposes. You must not use our site in any way that causes, or may cause, damage to the website or impairment of the availability or accessibility of the site.
TermsOfService.section4Content: BetterKing Kitchen shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of our services.
TermsOfService.section5Content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

CookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.section1Content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the site owners.
CookiePolicy.section2Content: BetterKing Kitchen uses cookies to understand how you interact with our website, remember your preferences (such as language selection), and improve your overall browsing experience.
CookiePolicy.point1Desc: Strictly necessary for the website to function properly. They cannot be switched off in our systems.
CookiePolicy.point2Desc: Allow us to recognize and count the number of visitors and see how visitors move around our website.
CookiePolicy.point3Desc: Used to recognize you when you return to our website and remember your preferences.
CookiePolicy.section4Content: You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some parts of our website.
CookiePolicy.section5Content: If you have any questions about our Cookie Policy, please contact us at:
